title: <div><font face=".AppleColorEmojiUI">🔥</font> Are we locking this in? 🎮📖</div
content:
🔥 Are we locking this in? 🎮📖

📌 Version 6.1 – Tracking XP, Alignments, & RPG Selections On-Campus + True Ending Mechanics


🚀 This iteration ensures that XP, alignments, and RPG choices are tracked in an easy, organic way for an in-person class. It also finalizes the multi-tiered True Ending system.

📜 1. How to Track XP On-Campus (Simple, Organic, and Efficiently Managed)

📜 Method: The XP Ledger System (Physical + Digital Hybrid)
✔ Each student has an XP Ledger (Small Notebook or Digital Tracker).
✔ XP is updated in three ways: Weekly Skill Check Submission, In-Class Challenges, and Instructor Ledger.
✔ Students manually track their XP, while the professor keeps a master XP board.

📜 Weekly XP Submission – Keeping It Easy
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 253 (chunk 253/555)
